config.description: Configuration for a simplespace-managed space. A user must be authorized by the policy and their app by appAccess for a credential to be minted.

policy.description: How the authority decides whether to authorize a user: any requester (public), requesters on the member list (member-list), or by asking the managing app via checkUserAccess (managing-app).

appAccess.description: How the authority decides whether to authorize an app. Defaults to open.

managingApp.description: Service identifier (a DID with a service fragment) of the application that manages this space. Used to route application-level requests, and as the checkUserAccess target when policy is managing-app.

appAccessOpen.description: Any application may access the space. No client attestation is required, so public clients work.

appAccessAllowList.description: Only the listed applications may access the space. Evaluated against the attested client_id from the verified client attestation.

items.description: An OAuth client_id permitted to access the space.
